dsl:
cone C1 at (6.5, 7.5)
cone C2 at (9.5, 7.5)
cone C3 at (12.5, 7.5)
cone C4 at (15.5, 7.5)
player P1 at (4.5, 7.5) role "worker"
ball B1 at (4.5, 7.5)

step 1: P1 dribbles to C1
step 2: P1 dribbles to C2
step 3: P1 dribbles to C3
step 4: P1 dribbles to C4

point: Use inside and outside of the same foot
point: Keep the ball within half a step
notes: Classic 4-cone weave, 3m spacing, ball mastery fundamentals

dsl:
cone C1 at (8, 7.5)
cone C2 at (12, 7.5)
player P1 at (5, 7.5) role "worker"
player P2 at (15, 7.5) role "server"
ball B1 at (5, 7.5)

step 1: P1 passes to P2
step 2: P2 passes to P1
step 3: P1 passes to P2

point: First touch past your own cone, then pass back
point: Inside of the foot, plant foot pointing at target
notes: 2-cone wall-pass pattern; each player first-touches past their own cone before passing back

dsl:
gate G1 at (7.5, 9) width 2
gate G2 at (11.5, 5) width 2
gate G3 at (15.5, 10) width 2
player P1 at (4.5, 7) role "worker"
ball B1 at (4.5, 7)

step 1: P1 dribbles to G1
step 2: P1 dribbles to G2
step 3: P1 dribbles to G3

point: Scan before each gate; pick your line early
point: Change pace after you exit each gate
notes: 3 gates offset to force direction changes; intermediate U12+

dsl:
cone C1 at (5, 7.5)
cone C2 at (9, 7.5)
player P1 at (1, 7.5) role "worker"
ball B1 at (1, 7.5)
goal GL at (18, 7.5) width 7.32

step 1: P1 dribbles to C1
step 2: P1 dribbles to C2
step 3: P1 shoots at GL

point: Set up with your second-to-last touch
point: Head still, eyes on the ball at contact
notes: 2 cones → shot; introduces the finishing setup touch

dsl:
player P1 at (1, 7.5) role "server"
player P2 at (8, 4.5) role "worker"
cone C1 at (12, 7.5)
goal GL at (18, 7.5) width 7.32

step 1: P1 passes to P2
step 2: P2 dribbles to C1
step 3: P2 shoots at GL

point: Open hips before the ball arrives
point: First touch forward into the run, not into your feet
notes: Server feeds channel runner; attacking midfielder finishing pattern

dsl:
player P1 at (7, 5) role "worker"
player P2 at (13, 5) role "worker"
player P3 at (10, 10) role "worker"
ball B1 at (7, 5)

step 1: P1 passes to P3
step 2: P3 passes to P2
step 3: P2 passes to P1

point: Receive on the back foot, open to the next pass
point: Follow your pass two steps to keep the triangle alive

player P1 at (1, 4) role "server"
player P2 at (4, 7.5) role "worker"
player P3 at (12, 7.5) role "worker"
goal GL at (18, 7.5) width 7.32

step 1: P1 passes to P2
step 2: P2 dribbles to P3
step 3: P2 shoots at GL

point: Attacker takes on the defender at a jog-to-sprint change of pace
point: Defender pressures from the attacker's strong side to force weak-foot decisions
notes: Server feeds attacker; defender stands between attacker and goal; attacker beats defender and finishes

dsl:
player P1 at (7, 4.5) role "worker"
player P2 at (13, 4.5) role "worker"
player P3 at (13, 10.5) role "worker"
player P4 at (7, 10.5) role "worker"
player P5 at (10, 7.5) role "server"
ball B1 at (7, 4.5)

step 1: P1 passes to P2
step 2: P2 passes to P3
step 3: P3 passes to P4

point: Body shape open before the ball arrives
point: One-touch only if your next option is already set up
notes: 4v1 rondo on a 6x6 grid; P5 is the defender (server role)
